data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers, specifically mentioning that they should be hashed where needed. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations that confirm this requirement. The absence of concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to the storage and hashing of sensitive identifiers leads to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of privacy-first storage for sensitive identifiers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for privacy-first storage implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the hashing and storage of sensitive identifiers.
